message:
fix(authfile): add hashBytes to avoid TOCTOU race in credential hashing

Add hashBytes() helper that computes SHA-256 from in-memory bytes
instead of re-reading from disk. Use it in hashClaudeCredentials()
fallback paths (invalid JSON, missing claudeAiOauth section) to
avoid a TOCTOU race condition where hashFile() would re-read the
file after it may have changed between the initial read and the
hash computation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
